description_for_model: Free cryptocurrency news API. Fetch real-time news from 130+ crypto sources including CoinDesk, Decrypt, The Block, CoinTelegraph. No API key needed. Search news, get Bitcoin/DeFi/breaking news, trending topics, market sentiment, Fear & Greed index, and AI analysis. Use this to answer questions about current crypto news, market sentiment, and trending topics.
description_for_human: Real-time crypto news from 130+ sources. No API key required. Get latest news, search topics, sentiment analysis, Fear & Greed index, and trending topics.
